title: mentha fruteticola
intro: Mentha fruteticola, also known as the white mint or mountain mint, is a species of mint native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its various health benefits. The health benefits of Mentha fruteticola include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and reduce pain and inflammation. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
